headlines.title: Trump Vows to Keep Hormuz Blockade as Gas Prices Climb Higher
headlines.description: President Donald Trump says the war with Iran and the United States' blockade of the Strait of Hormuz will continue unless Iran gives in, saying, “At this moment, there will never be a deal unless they agree that there will be no nuclear weapons.” It comes as Pentagon officials say the war has cost $25 billion so far during a tense hearing on Capitol Hill where Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth faced criticism of the administration’s strategy. NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: How 'Little Sparta' UAE shocked the Gulf by going its own way on oil
headlines.description: DOHA, Qatar — Among senior U.S. officials, the wealthy Persian Gulf nation of the United Arab Emirates is known by an affectionate nickname: Little Sparta

headlines.title: Trump says he spoke to Putin about Ukraine and Iran during phone call
headlines.description: President Donald Trump told reporters that he spoke with Russian President Vladimir Putin in a phone call about the wars in Iran and Ukraine. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports on the assistance Putin offered to the U.S. in the war with Iran.

headlines.title: '86 it': Restaurant workers say the term at center of Comey's indictment is 'everyday lingo'
headlines.description: Federal prosecutors say former FBI Director James Comey's use of the term “86” on Instagram was a threat “to do harm" to President Donald Trump — but some food service workers say the term is "everyday lingo" to them."It’s probably the most overused word in hospitality," said Mike Reyes, 45, who has worked in the hospitality industry for years, currently as an operational excellence consultant at FLIK Hospitality Group."Any time you're out of anything, it's 86-ed" — meaning it's unav

headlines.title: TikTokers 'raid' Scientology buildings and post them online
headlines.description: The Church of Scientology is reporting several incidents of young adults rushing through their buildings and pushing past security in viral "speed running" trend. The LAPD is now looking into it.

headlines.title: D4vd accused of killing teen after she threatened to release details to 'end his career'
headlines.description: The singer D4vd is accused of killing a teenage girl whose dismembered body was found in the trunk of his Tesla after she threatened to reveal information that could “end his career and destroy his life,” according to court documents filed.
